  "claims": [
    "Senate Bill 48 aims to ensure greater protections for students and families against immigration enforcement in schools.",
    "Targeting minors on school campuses for immigration enforcement negatively impacts school attendance and funding.",
    "Every child deserves a safe place to learn, free from the threat of separation or deportation.",
    "California aims to send a message that schools should be safe havens for learning.",
    "SB 48 seeks to keep ICE off school campuses and shield school data from misuse.",
    "Schools should remain safe, inclusive spaces where students are protected, regardless of immigration status.",

  ]
